name: hestia
description: Claude Code's .claude/-tree keeper: tends the whole tree (rules, skills, agents, commands, CLAUDE.md) for drift from the code and routes each fix to the tool that owns it. Detects both broken path references (/hestia:freshness) and semantically stale prose (/hestia:prose-drift). Keeps the workspace tidy — parks deferred work, saves decisions to memory. Read-only by default.
